items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We provide nanny placement, babysitting placement, dog walking and sitting, and errand running and home organization services.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Submit a family application through our website or contact us by phone or email. After a consultation, we'll match you with the right professional.

items.question: How do you ensure quality?
items.answer: Every professional undergoes background checks, reference checks, and qualification verification before being placed.

items.question: Can I meet the professional before committing?
items.answer: Yes — we encourage families to meet candidates to ensure the right fit before moving forward.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We currently serve the Tampa Bay Area in Florida.

items.question: Are there registration fees?
items.answer: Yes — all non-refundable. Nanny: $250, Babysitting: $100, Dog walker: $50 / Dog sitter: $75, Errand runner/organizer: $100–$150.
